mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SysAuthGrpLangMapper.list 설 명 : 시스템 권한 언어의 전체 목록 */ SELECT MENU_TYCD as menuType , USER_AUTHRT_ID as authGrpCd , LANG_CD as langCd , AUTHRT_GRPNM as authGrpNm , AUTHRT_GRP_EXPLN as authGrpDesc FROM TB_SYS_AUTH_GRP_LANG WHERE MENU_TYCD = #{menuType} AND USER_AUTHRT_ID = #{authGrpCd} ORDER BY LANG_CD
